---
title: "Correlation_analysis"
author: "Savanah Leidholt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
.libPaths("~/leidholt/R")
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(Hmisc)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyselect)
library(utils)
library(purrr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(labelled)
library(corrplot)
library(gtools)
library(pheatmap)
library(patchwork)
library(jsonlite)
```

```{r}
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "leidholt") {
  root_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/"
  git_path  <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/CHCO-Code/"
  keys      <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/leidholt/keys.json")
} else if (user == "sleidholt") {
  root_path <- "/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
  dir.results <- file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Results")
  git_path <- "/Users/sleidholt/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
} else if (user == "savanahleidholt") {
  root_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
  dir.results <- file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Results")
  git_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/Desktop/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}
```
#---------------------------------------------------------
#load in protein matrix, metadata, and elasticnet results
#---------------------------------------------------------
```{r}
prot_log <- readRDS(
  file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data", "prot_log2.rds"))
rownames(prot_log) <- trimws(rownames(prot_log))

limma_inputs <- readRDS(
  file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data", "limma_gsea_inputs_age_sex_study.rds")
)

dat1 <- limma_inputs$primary
meta1 <- dat1$samples
meta1$record_id <- trimws(as.character(meta1$record_id))
prot_mat <- prot_log[meta1$record_id, , drop = FALSE]

stopifnot(identical(rownames(prot_mat), meta1$record_id))

elasticnet_results <- read.csv(file = file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Results", "Proteomics Results", "ElasticNet", "results_table.csv"))
elasticnet_results
proteins <- elasticnet_results %>%
  dplyr::select(contrast, feature_id) 

global_proteins <- elasticnet_results %>%
  dplyr::pull(feature_id) %>%
  unique() %>%
  intersect(prot_mat)

meta1 <- meta1 %>%
  mutate(
    age = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(age)),
    sex = factor(sex),
    study6 = factor(study6),
    group4 = factor(group4, levels = c("LC", "OC", "T1D", "T2D"))
  )

```

```{r}
meta1<- meta1 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(log_uACR = log(acr_u))


# outcomes for correlations
partial_outcomes <- c(
  "HbA1c",
  "log_uACR",
  "eGFR",
  "BMI"
)

partial_covars <- c("age", "sex", "study") #study may need to be removed 

# clinical + protein correlation dataframe
corr_df <- bind_cols(
  meta1 %>%
    transmute(
      record_id,
      group = as.factor(group),
      group_code = case_when(
        str_detect(str_to_lower(group), "type 1") ~ "T1D",
        str_detect(str_to_lower(group), "type 2") ~ "T2D",
        str_detect(str_to_lower(group), "lean")   ~ "LC",
        str_detect(str_to_lower(group), "obese")  ~ "OC",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      age = as.numeric(age),
      sex = factor(sex),
      study = as.factor(study),
      HbA1c = as.numeric(hba1c),
      log_uACR  = as.numeric(log_uACR),
      eGFR  = as.numeric(eGFR_fas_cr),
      cortical_r = as.numeric(avg_c_r2),
      medullary_r = as.numeric(avg_k_r2),
      BMI   = as.numeric(bmi)
    ),
  as.data.frame(prot_log)
)

View(corr_df)
```

```{r}
get_contrast <- function(contrast_name) {
  strsplit(contrast_name, "_vs_")[[1]]
}
```

#--------------------------
#partial spearman function
#--------------------------
```{r}
run_partial_spearman <- function(
    df,
    protein,
    outcome,
    covars = c("age", "sex"),
    min_n = 5)
{

  vars_needed <- c(protein, outcome, covars)

  sub_df <- df %>%
    select(all_of(vars_needed)) %>%
    drop_na()

  if(nrow(sub_df) < min_n) {
    return(
      tibble(
        n = nrow(sub_df),
        rho = NA_real_,
        p_value = NA_real_
      )
    )
  }


  fit_prot <- lm(
    as.formula(
      paste(protein, "~", paste(covars, collapse = " + "))
    ),
    data = sub_df
  )

  fit_out <- lm(
    as.formula(
      paste(outcome, "~", paste(covars, collapse = " + "))
    ),
    data = sub_df
  )

  res_prot <- resid(fit_prot)
  res_out  <- resid(fit_out)

  ct <- suppressWarnings(
    cor.test(
      res_prot,
      res_out,
      method = "spearman"
    )
  )

  tibble(
    n = nrow(sub_df),
    rho = unname(ct$estimate),
    p_value = ct$p.value
  )
}
```

```{r}
run_one_contrast_partial <- function(contrast_name,
                                     analysis_df,
                                     proteins,
                                     outcomes = c("HbA1c", "log_uACR", "BMI", "eGFR","cortical_r","medullary_r" ),
                                     covars = c("age", "sex"),
                                     min_n = 15) {
  
  groups <- get_contrast(contrast_name)
  
  df_sub <- analysis_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(group_code %in% groups)
  
  prots <- proteins %>%
    dplyr::filter(contrast == contrast_name) %>%
    dplyr::pull(feature_id) %>%
    unique() %>%
    na.omit() %>%
    as.character()
  
  prots <- intersect(prots, colnames(df_sub))
  
  message("Contrast: ", contrast_name)
  message("Groups: ", paste(groups, collapse = ", "))
  message("N samples: ", nrow(df_sub))
  message("N proteins: ", length(prots))
  
  if (nrow(df_sub) == 0 || length(prots) == 0) {
    return(tibble::tibble())
  }
  
  prots <- prots[
    sapply(df_sub[, prots, drop = FALSE], function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)
  ]
  
  tidyr::crossing(
    outcome = outcomes,
    feature_id = prots
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      stats = purrr::map2(
        feature_id,
        outcome,
        ~run_partial_spearman(
          df = df_sub,
          protein = .x,
          outcome = .y,
          covars = covars,
          min_n = min_n
        )
      )
    ) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(stats) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(contrast = contrast_name) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      elasticnet_results %>%
        dplyr::select(feature_id, gene_symbol, contrast) %>%
        dplyr::distinct(feature_id, contrast, .keep_all = TRUE),
      by = c("feature_id", "contrast")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(contrast, outcome) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::arrange(outcome, FDR)
}
```

```{r}
partial_T1D_vs_LC <- run_one_contrast_partial(
  contrast_name = "T1D_vs_LC",
  analysis_df = corr_df,
  proteins  = proteins,
  outcomes = c("HbA1c", "log_uACR", "BMI", "eGFR", "cortical_r","medullary_r"),
  covars = c("age", "sex")
)

partial_T1D_vs_LC
```


```{r}
partial_T1D_vs_OC <- run_one_contrast_partial(
  contrast_name = "T1D_vs_OC",
  analysis_df = corr_df,
  proteins  = proteins,
  outcomes = c("HbA1c", "log_uACR", "BMI", "eGFR", "cortical_r","medullary_r"),
  covars = c("age", "sex")
)

partial_T1D_vs_OC
```

```{r}
partial_T1D_vs_T2D <- run_one_contrast_partial(
  contrast_name = "T1D_vs_T2D",
  analysis_df = corr_df,
  proteins  = proteins,
  outcomes = c("HbA1c", "log_uACR", "BMI", "eGFR","cortical_r","medullary_r"),
  covars = c("age", "sex")
)

partial_T1D_vs_T2D
```
```{r}
partial_T2D_vs_LC <- run_one_contrast_partial(
  contrast_name = "T2D_vs_LC",
  analysis_df = corr_df,
  proteins  = proteins,
  outcomes = c("HbA1c", "log_uACR", "BMI", "eGFR","cortical_r","medullary_r"),
  covars = c("age", "sex")
)

partial_T2D_vs_LC
```
```{r}
partial_T2D_vs_OC <- run_one_contrast_partial(
  contrast_name = "T2D_vs_OC",
  analysis_df = corr_df,
  proteins  = proteins,
  outcomes = c("HbA1c", "log_uACR", "BMI", "eGFR","cortical_r","medullary_r"),
  covars = c("age", "sex")
)

partial_T2D_vs_OC
```

```{r}
partial_OC_vs_LC <- run_one_contrast_partial(
  contrast_name = "OC_vs_LC",
  analysis_df = corr_df,
  proteins  = proteins,
  outcomes = c("HbA1c", "log_uACR", "BMI", "eGFR","cortical_r","medullary_r"),
  covars = c("age", "sex")
)

partial_OC_vs_LC
```






```{r}
final_cor_results <- bind_rows(
  partial_OC_vs_LC,
  partial_T1D_vs_LC,
  partial_T1D_vs_OC,
  partial_T1D_vs_T2D,
  partial_T2D_vs_LC,
  partial_T2D_vs_OC
) %>%
  select(
    contrast,
    outcome,
    feature_id,
    gene_symbol,
    rho,
    p_value,
    FDR,
    n,
    everything()
  ) %>%
  arrange(contrast, outcome, FDR)

final_cor_results
#write_csv(
 # final_partial_results,
  #file.path(dir.results, "partial_spearman_global_and_contrast_specific.csv")
#)


```
```{r}
library(ggrepel)

plot_cor_volcano_panel <- function(dat,
                                   contrast_name,
                                   fdr_cutoff = 0.05,
                                   p_cutoff = 0.05,
                                   label_top_n = 10) {
  
  plot_df <- dat %>%
    filter(
      contrast == contrast_name,
      is.finite(rho),
      is.finite(p_value),
      is.finite(FDR)
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      neg_log10_FDR = -log10(FDR),
      sig_class = case_when(
        FDR < fdr_cutoff & rho > 0 ~ "FDR positive",
        FDR < fdr_cutoff & rho < 0 ~ "FDR negative",
        #p_value < p_cutoff & rho > 0 ~ "Nominal positive",
        #p_value < p_cutoff & rho < 0 ~ "Nominal negative",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      label = if_else(
        is.na(gene_symbol) | gene_symbol == "",
        feature_id,
        gene_symbol
      )
    )
  
  label_df <- plot_df %>%
    filter(sig_class %in% c("FDR positive", "FDR negative")) %>%
    group_by(outcome) %>%
    arrange(FDR, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    slice_head(n = label_top_n) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  ggplot(
    plot_df,
    aes(x = rho, y = neg_log10_FDR)
  ) +
    geom_point(
      aes(color = sig_class),
      alpha = 0.8,
      size = 4
    ) + 
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(0,12),
      breaks = seq(0,12, by = 3)) +
    geom_hline(
      yintercept = -log10(fdr_cutoff),
      linetype = "dashed",
      color = "red"
    ) +
    geom_vline(
      xintercept = 0,
      linetype = "dashed"
    ) +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = label_df,
      aes(label = label),
      size = 6,
      max.overlaps = Inf
    ) +
    facet_wrap(
      ~outcome,
      nrow = 2
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "FDR positive" = "orange3",
       # "Nominal positive" = "orange",
        "FDR negative" = "purple4",
        #"Nominal negative" = "plum",
        "Not significant" = "grey80"
      )
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste0(
        "Partial Spearman Correlations: ",
        contrast_name
      ),
      x = "Partial Spearman rho",
      y = "-log10(FDR)",
      color = NULL,
    )+
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
      strip.text = element_text(size = 12,face = "bold"))
}
```

```{r}
plot_cor_volcano_panel(
  final_cor_results,
  contrast_name = "T1D_vs_LC"
)

ggsave(filename = file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "figures", "Correlations", "T1D_LC_volcano.png"),
       width = 12,
       height = 10,
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
plot_cor_volcano_panel(
  final_cor_results,
  contrast_name = "T1D_vs_OC"
)

ggsave(filename = file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "figures", "Correlations", "T1D_OC_volcano.png"),
       width = 12,
       height = 8,
       dpi = 300)
```
```{r}
plot_cor_volcano_panel(
  final_cor_results,
  contrast_name = "T1D_vs_T2D"
)

ggsave(filename = file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "figures", "Correlations", "T1D_T2D_volcano.png"),
       width = 12,
       height = 10,
       dpi = 300)
```
```{r}
plot_cor_volcano_panel(
  final_cor_results,
  contrast_name = "T2D_vs_LC"
)

ggsave(filename = file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "figures", "Correlations", "T2D_LC_volcano.png"),
       width = 12,
       height = 10,
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
plot_cor_volcano_panel(
  final_cor_results,
  contrast_name = "T2D_vs_OC"
)

ggsave(filename = file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "figures", "Correlations", "T2D_OC_volcano.png"),
       width = 12,
       height = 10,
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
plot_cor_volcano_panel(
  final_cor_results,
  contrast_name = "OC_vs_LC"
)

ggsave(filename = file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "figures", "Correlations", "OC_LC_volcano.png"),
       width = 12,
       height = 10,
       dpi = 300)
```
